scripts.fmt:back: zig fmt backend/build.zig backend/src && zig fmt --zon backend/build.zig.zon
scripts.fmt:check:back: zig fmt --check backend/build.zig backend/src && zig fmt --check --zon backend/build.zig.zon
scripts.lint: bun run lint:front && bun run fmt:check:back
scripts.format: bun run format:front && bun run fmt:back
scripts.format:check: bun run format:check:front && bun run fmt:check:back
scripts.check: bun run lint && bun run format:check && bun run test:back && bun run build:front
